metadata.critical_threshold: Sharp shift >30% for PIR-06; Bersatu sharp-negative = [CRITICAL]; PIR-16 [CRITICAL] if hard-news corroborates 'Bersatu exit imminent?' OR 'sasar bentuk kerajaan' OR viral >50%

metadata.cycle_assessment: LOW-YIELD CYCLE — alternate-outlet corroboration only; 0 genuinely new stories; 1 new candidate confirmation (G Manivanan / DUN Jeram Padang) via Sinar body text. Fahmi-KJ exchange now 3-outlet corroborated (FMT EN+BM + Sinar). MCMC 3R enforcement now 2-outlet corroborated (HarianMetro + Utusan). 6 surface-level detections from Sinar related-article links flagged for next-cycle monitoring (Akmal Saleh 'DAP ketandusan idea', DUN Chuah candidate dispute, Aminuddin 'kekal di Sikamat' sentiment, EC postal ballots, Fathi Aris pro-BN commentary, KJ 'ada sesuatu yang tak kena').

new_entities.rationale: NEW rev25 (earlyam cycle). PH candidate DUN Jeram Padang — CONFIRMED via Sinar body text ('calon Pakatan Harapan (PH) DUN Jeram Padang'). Previously appeared only as photo caption in night3 Sinar manifesto articles. Campaign event with Fahmi Fadzil at Felda Palong 2 (Jempol district) — 'Program Ziarah Kasih' on Monday 20 Jul. Federal-minister-level campaign alongside a confirmed candidate = positive PH ground signal. 4-cornered fight (PH-Manivanan / BN / Bersatu-solo / ASLI-Dayana Yusof) tempers the positivity. Mildly positive; stable. [none] — routine candidate confirmation; seat not on director's highest-priority list.

NEW rev25 (earlyam cycle). 4-cornered fight: PH (G Manivanan) vs BN vs Bersatu (solo logo) vs ASLI (Dayana Yusof). Jempol district; Felda Palong 2 settlement area. Connects to FELDA development manifesto pledge. Fahmi Fadzil campaigned here with Manivanan at 'Program Ziarah Kasih' 20 Jul. 4-cornered fights are inherently volatile; the Fahmi visit provides a mild positive tilt. Neutral; stable. [none] — not on director's highest-priority seat list (N.14, N.15, N.28, N.13, N.32, N.27, N.20, N.25, N.10, N.33, Rantau, Pertang).

new_entities.entity: DAP ketandusan idea (Akmal Saleh claim — Sinar related-link)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev25 (earlyam cycle — SURFACE-LEVEL DETECTION). Sinar related-articles section surfaces headline: 'DAP ketandusan idea, bawa penipuan baharu pada PRN Negeri Sembilan - Akmal Saleh.' Umno Youth chief Akmal Saleh claims DAP has run out of ideas and is bringing 'new lies' to PRN NS. PIR-16 narrative: BN/Umno counter-attack on DAP — a negative attack claim against DAP. Full article NOT scraped this cycle — flagged for next-cycle extraction if content surfaces. Negative (attack on DAP); stable. [none] — surface-level headline only; not yet developed into a full propagating narrative. Watch for amplification.

new_entities.entity: DUN Chuah candidate selection dispute (Sinar related-link)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev25 (earlyam cycle — SURFACE-LEVEL DETECTION). Sinar related-articles section: 'PH nafi dakwaan tak puas hati pemilihan calon DUN Chuah.' PH denies dissatisfaction over DUN Chuah candidate selection. The denial itself signals internal PH friction over candidate picking for DUN Chuah — a negative intra-coalition friction signal. Full article NOT scraped — flagged for next-cycle monitoring. Mildly negative (internal friction); stable. [none] — surface-level; Chuah not on director's highest-priority seat list. Watch for escalation.

new_entities.entity: Aminuddin 'kekal di Sikamat' public sentiment (Sinar related-link)
new_entities.rationale: NEW rev25 (earlyam cycle — SURFACE-LEVEL DETECTION). Sinar related-articles section: 'Aminuddin disenangi, ramai masih harap beliau kekal di Sikamat.' Public sentiment that many still hope Aminuddin stays at Sikamat (his former seat N.13, now vacated for his Linggi N.32 challenge). Reinforces PIR-07 'fleeing Sikamat' context — Aminuddin's move from Sikamat to Linggi may be unpopular with his local base. Dual signal: positive for Aminuddin personally (popular at Sikamat) but negative for the strategic move (base wants him to stay). As a narrative about the move, mildly negative. Full article NOT scraped — flagged for monitoring. [PRIORITY] — directly reinforces the PIR-07 Sikamat/Linggi swap strategic risk (already [CRITICAL] entity 'Aminuddin Sikamat→Linggi swap strategic risk' -0.35 stable). Surface-level but topically significant.

NEW rev25 (earlyam cycle — SURFACE-LEVEL DETECTION). MalayMail related-articles section: 'EC dispatches 13,263 postal ballots for Negeri Sembilan state polls.' Election Commission logistical milestone for PRN NS. Early voting 28 Jul, polling 1 Aug confirmed. Neutral (election logistics); stable. [none]. Confirms the postal-vote figure already in metadata (13,263).

NEW rev25 (earlyam cycle — SURFACE-LEVEL DETECTION). Sinar related-articles section: 'PH tak punya hak untuk berasa tertipu dengan UMNO, BN - Fathi Aris.' Commentator Fathi Aris argues PH has no right to feel betrayed by UMNO/BN. PIR-16 narrative: pro-BN commentary framing coalition dynamics — reinforces BN-PN normalization (echoes the 'Fathi Aris' pro-BN framing already tracked in rev22 entity build, source_count +1). Mildly negative (pro-BN, anti-PH-narrative framing); stable. [none] — opinion/commentary; surface-level.

updated_entities.rationale: rev24 +0.32 stable priority. earlyam cycle: Sinar Harian now CORROBORATES the Fahmi-KJ exchange (FMT EN+BM were first 2 outlets; Sinar = 3rd outlet). Sinar adds: KJ 'sudah agak lama meninggalkan parti' (left Umno for quite some time) and 'mahu memulakan semula asas politiknya' (wants to rebuild political base) — supports Fahmi's 'political relevance' characterisation, reinforcing the rebuttal's credibility. Sinar also names G Manivanan as PH DUN Jeram Padang candidate in body text (Fahmi campaigned with Manivanan at Felda Palong 2). Cross-outlet corroboration strengthens the counter-narrative's propagation. Score +0.32 -> +0.34 (marginal — multi-outlet corroboration). Stable. [PRIORITY] — central PIR-16 exchange figure; narrative battle intensifying across outlets. Watch for KJ counter-response.

rev24 -0.15 declining priority. earlyam cycle: Sinar Harian CORROBORATES KJ's 'isyarat' (signal) framing (3rd outlet — FMT EN+BM + Sinar). Sinar adds context that mildly undermines KJ: 'sudah agak lama meninggalkan parti' (left Umno for quite some time) and 'mahu memulakan semula asas politiknya' (wants to rebuild political base) — directly supports Fahmi's 'KJ driven by political relevance' counter-frame. KJ's 'Ada sesuatu yang tak kena dalam Kerajaan Perpaduan' (something wrong in Unity Govt) quote also surfaced in Sinar related-articles section. More outlet propagation = wider exposure of both KJ's claim AND its rebuttal. The Sinar-added context tilts further against KJ's credibility. Score -0.15 -> -0.18 (marginal decline). Trend declining (continues). [PRIORITY] — central PIR-16 exchange figure; narrative battle intensifying. No [CRITICAL] — no PIR-16 threshold cross.

updated_entities.entity: Anwar discipline warning / no resignation order
updated_entities.rationale: rev24 +0.20 stable priority. earlyam cycle: Sinar Harian CORROBORATES the Anwar discipline clarification (3rd outlet — FMT EN+BM + Sinar). Confirms: PM issued no resignation order, only reminded all officeholders to maintain unity spirit, discipline, professionalism during PRN campaign. Sinar confirms: democratic differences allowed (parties contested separately in prior PRNs). Investor perception cited. 3-outlet corroboration strengthens the defusing/clarifying narrative. Score +0.20 -> +0.22 (marginal — multi-outlet corroboration). Stable. [PRIORITY] — resolves carry-forward watch item; 3rd outlet confirms.

rev24 -0.30 stable priority. earlyam cycle: Utusan CORROBORATES the MCMC 3R enforcement story (2nd outlet — HarianMetro + Utusan). Confirms: MCMC + PDRM investigating 3R content targeting Tuanku Muhriz; individual recorded under Section 233 CMA 1998; MCMC warns all parties avoid 3R during campaign period. Utusan adds: individual called to IPD Seremban for statement recording (escalation of enforcement process — from recording to summons). 2nd-outlet corroboration + enforcement-process escalation reinforces the negative (regulatory guardrail / royal-institution sensitivity) signal. Score -0.30 -> -0.32 (marginal). Stable. [PRIORITY] — reinforces royal-institution dimension of derhaka thread.

rev24 -0.10 stable priority. earlyam cycle: Utusan CORROBORATES the 3R investigation targeting Tuanku Muhriz (2nd outlet — HarianMetro + Utusan). Utusan adds: individual called to IPD Seremban for statement recording. The 2nd-outlet confirmation + enforcement-process step (summons to IPD) slightly deepens the negative (target of 3R content, investigation advancing). Score -0.10 -> -0.12 (marginal). Stable. [PRIORITY] — central to royal-institution dimension; investigation advancing.

rev24 -0.20 stable priority. earlyam cycle: Utusan CORROBORATION of MCMC 3R enforcement targeting Tuanku Muhriz (2nd outlet) reinforces the royal-institution dimension of the Pertang derhaka thread. No explicit 'derhaka' language this cycle but 3R enforcement = real-world manifestation; the investigation is advancing (individual summoned to IPD Seremban for statement recording). The carry-forward flag is upgraded to 'ESCALATED (counter-narrative active) — corroborated by Utusan (2nd outlet).' Score -0.20 -> -0.22 (marginal — 2nd-outlet corroboration + enforcement advancement). Stable. [PRIORITY] per director rule ('if defector-framing or derhaka sentiment intensifies at N.14 or Pertang, flag [PRIORITY]'). NOT [CRITICAL] — no defector-framing intensification at N.14; no explicit 'derhaka' language; escalation is via regulatory enforcement corroboration, not narrative intensification.
